pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies 'Name: Nutrition Counseling'. Web search verified this is a real appointment service name used in Bahmni healthcare systems and across major healthcare organizations (MedStar Health, UC San Diego Health, Columbia Health, etc.).

Task description explicitly specifies 'Duration: 45 Minutes'. Web search of nutrition counseling appointments across major US healthcare providers (Brigham and Women's Hospital, Premier Health, Inspira Health, etc.) confirmed that initial nutrition counseling appointments range from 45-90 minutes, with 45 minutes being a common duration for initial visits. Bahmni documentation confirms duration field accepts positive integer values in minutes.

Task description explicitly specifies 'Description: Dietary planning and review'. Web search of nutrition counseling services at healthcare organizations (Stanford Healthcare, Atlantic Health, UC San Diego Health, Medicare, Intermountain Healthcare, Mayo Clinic, etc.) confirmed that nutrition counseling services centrally involve 'dietary planning', 'meal planning', 'review of dietary goals', and 'personalized guidance on dietary choices'. The description aligns with ICD-10 code Z71.3 'Dietary Counseling and Surveillance'.

privileged_info_summary: All three metadata claims are verified against authoritative sources. 'Nutrition Counseling' is a confirmed appointment service name used in Bahmni healthcare systems and major US health providers. 45 minutes is a verified realistic duration for initial nutrition counseling appointments (documented across Brigham and Women's Hospital, Premier Health, and other major healthcare organizations). 'Dietary planning and review' accurately describes nutrition counseling services, consistent with healthcare provider descriptions and ICD-10 coding standards. The metadata is internally consistent with the task description and correctly used by the verifier implementation.
